Generated Narrative: OperationDefinition Read-EU-Access-Permission

URL: [base]/$read-eu-access-permission

Output parameters Profile:GEM ERPEU PR PAR Access Authorization Response

Parameters

UseNameScopeCardinalityTypeBindingDocumentation
OUTcountryCode1..1Coding

The country for which the patient wants to grant access.

OUTaccessCode1..1Identifier

The access code for that country.

OUTvalidUntil1..1instant

The instant until the access code is valid.

OUTcreatedAt1..1instant

The instant when the record was created in the E-Rezept-Fachdienst.

name: Read_Access_Permission
description: This operation reads the currenty in the E-Rezept-Fachdienst registered Access Code for redeeming ePrescriptions in an EU country.

parameter.name: countryCode
parameter.documentation: The country for which the patient wants to grant access.

parameter.name: accessCode
parameter.documentation: The access code for that country.

parameter.name: validUntil
parameter.documentation: The instant until the access code is valid.

parameter.name: createdAt
parameter.documentation: The instant when the record was created in the E-Rezept-Fachdienst.
